title: Four Daughters
writer: Julius J. Epstein, Lenore J. Coffee, Fannie Hurst
actors: Claude Rains, John Garfield, Jeffrey Lynn
plot: A musician is blessed with four musical prodigies, all girls, and cursed when a troubled young composer enters the lives of his daughters.
awards: Nominated for 5 Oscars. 1 win & 7 nominations total
